name: Academic Writing
description: APA/MLA citations, paper structure, literature review, and scientific drafting.

name: Research Assistant
description: Systematic research: web search, source evaluation (CRAAP), synthesis, and saving findings to Dome.

name: Data Analysis
description: Statistical analysis, visualization, interpreting results, and turning data into insights.

name: Knowledge Management
description: Knowledge management: Zettelkasten, concept maps, taxonomies, and note systems.

name: Critical Thinking
description: Critical reasoning, argument evaluation, bias detection, and building sound arguments.

name: Calendar Assistant
description: Infer natural-language dates/times and create calendar events automatically.

name: Excel → Notebook
description: Read Excel resources from disk in a Dome notebook via pandas for data analysis.

name: Document Organizer
description: Reorganize the library with smart folder structure, resource moves, and group tagging.

name: PPT from Folder
description: Build a real .pptx presentation from documents inside a Dome folder automatically.

name: Flashcards
description: Create and manage flashcard decks from notes, PDFs, or any content using flashcard_create.

name: Word Document (DOCX)
description: Create, read, and update Word (.docx) documents in the Dome library.
